news.title: A look at Tim Cook’s 15-year legacy as CEO of Apple
news.summary: Cook, who joined Apple in 1998, succeeded Steve Jobs as CEO in 2011 and went on to transform Apple into a $4 trillion powerhouse.

news.title: Clarifai deletes 3 million photos that OkCupid provided to train facial recognition AI, report says
news.summary: The photo deletion comes after an FTC settlement with Clarifai. The company had asked OkCupid — whose executives had invested in Clarifai — to share data in 2014, according to court documents.

news.title: Former Pinterest team redesigns email with Extra — and it’s actually good
news.summary: Extra, from a team of former Pinterest designers and engineers, reimagines email around your life instead of the traditional inbox.

news.title: AI Dungeon maker Latitude unveils Voyage, a platform for creating AI-powered RPGs
news.summary: Latitude's new AI-native platform, Voyage, aims to help gamers create their very own role-playing game.

news.title: Framework’s Laptop 13 Pro launch event
news.summary: Framework CEO Nirav Patel is showing off his company’s latest modular, repairable laptops in San Francisco today. The headliner is the new Laptop 13 Pro, which is its first machine fully machined out of aluminum, and Patel says its goal is to be “the MacBook Pro for Linux users.” Read on below

news.title: X makes it 1,900 percent more expensive to post links
news.summary: Posting links to X through custom social media software just got a lot more expensive. On Monday, X significantly increased how much it costs to post a URL via the X API, which is what third-party tools use to hook into the platform. It now costs $0.20 when a link is posted, up from $0.01. […]

news.title: Framework’s first eGPUs turn its laptop into a desktop PC

news.title: Microsoft removes Call of Duty from Game Pass, lowers subscription pricing
news.summary: New Xbox CEO says subscription "has become too expensive for too many players."

news.title: Framework Laptop 13 Pro is a major overhaul for the modular, upgradeable laptop
news.summary: Laptop includes Core Ultra Series 3 CPUs, a bigger battery, and a touchscreen.

news.title: Framework Laptop 16 upgrades make it look less like an unfinished prototype
news.summary: A lower-end Ryzen AI 340 CPU option will also bring the price down, for now.

news.title: Internal emails show how Amazon raises prices across the Internet, lawsuit says
news.summary: “It’s working!“: Amazon emails with vendors show pattern of disappearing deals.

news.title: Anthropic gets $5B investment from Amazon, will use it to buy Amazon chips
news.summary: Anthropic secures 5 gigawatts of Amazon’s custom silicon as Claude demand soars.

news.title: Mozilla Used Anthropic’s Mythos to Find and Fix 151 Bugs in Firefox
news.summary: The Firefox team doesn’t think emerging AI capabilities will upend cybersecurity long term, but they warn that software developers are likely in for a rocky transition.

news.title: Tim Cook’s Legacy Is Turning Apple Into a Subscription
news.summary: The soon-to-exit Apple CEO went all in on services. Now, the incoming CEO, John Ternus, will need to embrace the AI era.

news.title: Meta Is Sued Over Scam Ads on Facebook and Instagram
news.summary: A lawsuit from the Consumer Federation of America accuses Meta of misleading consumers about its efforts to combat scams advertisements on its platforms.
